ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Brake Caliper Removal and Installation:Disc Brake Model
Rear Brake Caliper Disassembly and Reassembly:Disc Brake Model

attention3.ptxt: Perform this inspection in the following cases.

item.ptxt: When replacing the rear brake pads with new ones.
When checking thickness of rear brake pads.

servinfosub.title: Rear Brake Caliper and Caliper Carrier
servinfosub.ptxt: Check rear brake caliper and rear brake caliper carrier for deformation, cracks, damage and rust. Replace rear brake caliper or rear brake caliper carrier if any defect is found.

servinfosub.title: Piston Boot
servinfosub.ptxt: Check piston boot (1) for breaks, cracks and brake fluid leakage. If check result is not OK, replace piston boot.

servinfosub.title: Slide Pin
servinfosub.ptxt: Check that slide pins (1) move smoothly in axial directions before installing rear brake caliper to rear brake caliper carrier (3). Replace slide pins (1) and pin boots (2) if defective.

servinfosub.title: Caliper
servinfosub.ptxt: Push in adjustment bolt (1) by hand. Then check that adjustment bolt moves in arrow direction when lever (2) is moved. Replace rear brake caliper if defective.
